name: cabaret-vscode
description: Cabaret's review pages as read-only text buffers in VS Code

colors.description: Background of an added line in a Cabaret diff
Background of a removed line in a Cabaret diff

keybindings.when: editorTextFocus && resourceScheme == cabaret && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && resourceScheme == cabaret && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && cabaret.page == 'show' && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && cabaret.page == 'diff' && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && cabaret.page == 'show' && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && cabaret.page == 'show' && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && resourceScheme == cabaret && cabaret.page != 'diff' && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && resourceScheme == cabaret && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && resourceScheme == cabaret && cabaret.page != 'diff' && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && resourceScheme == cabaret && cabaret.page != 'diff' && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && resourceScheme == cabaret && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && resourceScheme == cabaret && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')
editorTextFocus && (cabaret.page == 'todo' || cabaret.page == 'show') && (!vim.active || vim.mode == 'Normal' || vim.mode == 'Visual' || vim.mode == 'VisualLine' || vim.mode == 'VisualBlock')

cabaret.context.description: Lines of context shown around each diff hunk

leaderkey.overrides._cabaret.description: Bindings contributed to the leaderkey extension, active when it is installed
